zh.Minster Lovel, Cornbury, Oxfordshire, En: 英國奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾
zh.Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆
zh.High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Bassett於1186年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆時，她的父親Sir Alan Basset31歲，母親Aline de Gai27歲。她於1216年與John Lovell在英國奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1231年在英國英格蘭維爾爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.Minster Lovel, Cornbury, Oxfordshire, En: 英国奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾
zh-hans.Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾維可姆
zh-hans.High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Bassett于1186年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾維可姆时，她的父亲Sir Alan Basset31岁，母亲Aline de Gai27岁。她于1216年与John Lovell在英国奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1231年在英国英格兰維爾爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Bassett was born in 1186, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Alan Basset, was 31 and her mother, Aline de Gai, was 27. She married John Lovell in 1216, in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1231, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Bassett est née en 1186, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alan Basset, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Aline de Gai, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Lovell en 1216, à Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1231, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Bassett 1186 in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alan Basset 31 und ihre Mutter Aline de Gai 27. Sie hat 1216 in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England John Lovell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1231 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Bassett è nata il nel 1186 nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Alan Basset, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Aline de Gai, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Lovell nel 1216, nel Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1231, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Bassettが1186年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Bassetは31歳，母Aline de Gaiは27歳であった。1216年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアミンスター ロベルでJohn Lovellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1231年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Bassett(이)가 1186년 영국 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan Basset(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline de Gai(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1216년 영국 스퍼드실르 민스터 러벨에서 John Lovell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Bassett nasceu em 1186, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan Basset, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Aline de Gai, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Lovell em 1216, em Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1231, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Bassett родилась в 1186 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alan Basset было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Aline de Gai, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Lovell в 1216 г. в местности минстир лавелл, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1231 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Bassett nació en 1186, en Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan Basset, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Aline de Gai, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Lovell en 1216, en Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1231, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
